headline: Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective Announces Successful Deployment of Advertisement to Instagram
subhead: New Orleans collective confirms paid-organic creative is now live on the platform, directing audiences toward new single
body: The Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective ("Ruff Cutz," "the Collective") today announced that it has posted an advertisement to Instagram. The advertisement, which is on Instagram, contains information regarding the Collective's new single — the latest offering from the group's hit album, released August 30.

"We are proud to confirm that the advertisement has been posted," said a spokesperson for the Collective. "It is on Instagram. We encourage all stakeholders to view it there, on Instagram, where it is currently located."

The 83-second creative represents the Collective's most significant advertisement-posting milestone to date. Industry observers note that the post is visible to users who navigate to the Collective's official Instagram profile, @ruff_cutz_collective, and scroll.

The advertisement is understood to be a video. According to individuals familiar with the matter, it depicts content. The Collective declined to elaborate further, citing a strategic preference that audiences experience the advertisement firsthand, on Instagram.
The new single is available wherever the new single is available. The hit album, released August 30, remains a hit.
Ruff Cutz has not ruled out the possibility of posting additional advertisements at a future date.
boilerplate: Ruff Cutz is a New Orleans-based musical outfit playing tunes that make you feel. The Collective remains committed to its mission of music for the movement. Recordings are available on Bandcamp at turbozone.bandcamp.com.

media.caption: The 83-second creative, as deployed to Instagram.

headline: Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective Confirms Official Web Presence at ruffcutz.org
subhead: Collective establishes digital headquarters at named domain
body: The Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective ("Ruff Cutz," "the Collective") today confirmed the establishment of an official web presence located at ruffcutz.org. The website is accessible via the address ruffcutz.org.
"The website is now live at ruffcutz.org," said a spokesperson for the Collective. "Stakeholders may reach it by entering ruffcutz.org into a web browser of their choosing."
The domain, ruffcutz.org, was selected following an internal evaluation process. The Collective declined to comment on the alternative domains considered.
The website offers visitors the ability to learn about the Collective, subscribe to SMS updates, and, as of today, read official press releases. Additional functionality has not been ruled out.
The Collective confirmed that ruffcutz.org is expected to remain the address of the website for the foreseeable future.
boilerplate: Ruff Cutz is a New Orleans-based musical outfit playing tunes that make you feel. The Collective remains committed to its mission of music for the movement. Recordings are available on Bandcamp at turbozone.bandcamp.com.

headline: Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective Announces Release of New Single From Hit Album
subhead: Latest offering now available wherever the new single is available
body: The Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective ("Ruff Cutz," "the Collective") today announced the release of a new single, the latest offering from the group's hit album, released August 30.
"We are proud to announce that the single has been released," said a spokesperson for the Collective. "It is a song. It is available."

The single represents a significant milestone in the Collective's ongoing rollout strategy, under which individual songs from the hit album are made available to the public on a rolling basis. Industry observers note that the single is a track that appears on the album.
The Collective confirmed that the single may be listened to. Listeners are advised that the experience of the single is best achieved by listening to it.
The new single is available wherever the new single is available. The hit album, released August 30, remains a hit.
boilerplate: Ruff Cutz is a New Orleans-based musical outfit playing tunes that make you feel. The Collective remains committed to its mission of music for the movement. Recordings are available on Bandcamp at turbozone.bandcamp.com.

headline: Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective Releases Album; Album Immediately Becomes Hit
subhead: Collective confirms the recording is, and will remain, a hit
body: The Ruff Cutz Ethical Musical Collective ("Ruff Cutz," "the Collective") today released its album. The album, available wherever albums are available, became a hit upon release and has remained a hit throughout the period since.

"It is a hit," said a spokesperson for the Collective. "We released it, and it became a hit. There was no interval during which it was not a hit. We are not presently aware of any future scenario in which it ceases to be a hit."

Internal performance metrics, which the Collective declined to define, are understood to be unprecedented. Industry observers, when reached, confirmed that the album exists. One observer described the tracklist as "containing songs."

The hit album represents the culmination of the Collective's foundational artistic vision and, sources indicate, the beginning of it. The recording was made in New Orleans — a city — by musicians, who play tunes that make you feel.
The Collective has requested that the album be referred to in all future correspondence as "the hit album." Deviations will be noted.
boilerplate: Ruff Cutz is a New Orleans-based musical outfit playing tunes that make you feel. The Collective remains committed to its mission of music for the movement. Recordings are available on Bandcamp at turbozone.bandcamp.com.
